examples: "I've already done that," said Ronnie virtuously.
Many daughters have done virtuously, but thou excellest them all.
I mean to bring them up virtuously, and they shall be honest, and nice, and believe in God, by the sacred name!
State universities have also virtuously kept financial aid for poorer students in place.
Hamlet famously tells his mother that if she acts virtuously long enough, she will one day become a virtuous person.
